properties.name: blog.static-domain
properties.description: Domain prefix applied to blog resources when rendering blog content.

properties.name: captcha.key
properties.description: Public hCaptcha site key returned to the frontend.

properties.name: captcha.secret-key
properties.description: Secret key used by the API to verify hCaptcha responses.

properties.name: captcha.valid-role
properties.description: Security role granted after a successful captcha verification.

properties.name: feedback.github.access-token
properties.description: GitHub token used to create and update feedback issues.

properties.name: feedback.github.organization
properties.description: GitHub organization that owns the feedback repository.

properties.name: feedback.github.repo
properties.description: GitHub repository used for feedback issues.

properties.name: feedback.github.user
properties.description: GitHub user name associated with feedback operations.

properties.name: feedback.voting.default-votable
properties.description: Apply the required votable label automatically to newly created issues.

properties.name: feedback.voting.max-votes-per-ip-per-day
properties.description: Maximum feedback votes allowed per IP address per day.

properties.name: feedback.voting.required-label
properties.description: GitHub issue label required before an issue can receive votes.

properties.name: front.affiliation-partners.api-base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the backend exposing affiliation partner data.

properties.name: front.affiliation-partners.api-key
properties.description: API key forwarded when calling the affiliation partners backend.

properties.name: front.affiliation-partners.partners-path
properties.description: Path appended to the affiliation partners base URL.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].allow-template-editing
properties.description: Allow users to edit prompt templates for the agent.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].allowed-roles
properties.description: Roles allowed to use the agent.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].attributes[].id
properties.description: Stable identifier of an agent attribute.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].attributes[].label
properties.description: Localized labels for an agent attribute.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].attributes[].options
properties.description: Allowed option values for list-like agent attributes.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].attributes[].type
properties.description: Agent attribute input type, such as TEXT, LIST, CHECKBOX, or COMBO.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].description
properties.description: Localized public descriptions of the agent.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].icon
properties.description: Frontend icon name displayed for the agent.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].id
properties.description: Stable agent identifier.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].mail-template.body
properties.description: Localized body text for the agent mail template.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].mail-template.subject
properties.description: Localized subject text for the agent mail template.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].mail-template.to
properties.description: Recipient email address for the agent mail template.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].name
properties.description: Localized display names of the agent.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].preview-label-key
properties.description: Translation key used for the agent preview label.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].prompt-template
properties.description: Deprecated single prompt template retained for backward-compatible configuration.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].prompt-templates[].content
properties.description: Prompt template content sent to the agent.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].prompt-templates[].id
properties.description: Stable prompt template identifier.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].prompt-templates[].title
properties.description: Localized prompt template titles.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].public-prompt-history
properties.description: Expose the agent prompt history publicly.

properties.name: front.agent.agents[].tags
properties.description: Tags used to categorize the agent.

properties.name: front.blog.base-urls
properties.description: Public blog base URLs indexed by language code.

properties.name: front.cache.forever-max-bytes
properties.description: Byte budget for the non-expiring local cache.

properties.name: front.cache.one-day-max-bytes
properties.description: Byte budget for the one-day local cache.

properties.name: front.cache.one-day-ttl
properties.description: Expiry applied to the one-day local cache.

properties.name: front.cache.one-hour-max-bytes
properties.description: Byte budget for the one-hour local cache.

properties.name: front.cache.one-hour-ttl
properties.description: Expiry applied to the one-hour local cache.

properties.name: front.cache.one-minute-max-bytes
properties.description: Byte budget for the one-minute local cache.

properties.name: front.cache.one-minute-ttl
properties.description: Expiry applied to the one-minute local cache.

properties.name: front.cache.path
properties.description: Filesystem path used for front-api cache files.

properties.name: front.contact.email
properties.description: Recipient email address for contact form submissions.

properties.name: front.embedding.api-base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the embedding service.

properties.name: front.exposed-docs.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the exposed docs microservice.

properties.name: front.exposed-docs.public-access
properties.description: Allow anonymous access to exposed docs endpoints when security is enabled.

properties.name: front.geocode.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the geocode microservice.

properties.name: front.google-indexation.batch-enabled
properties.description: Enable scheduled batch dispatch of queued URLs.

properties.name: front.google-indexation.batch-interval
properties.description: Fixed delay between batch dispatches.

properties.name: front.google-indexation.batch-size
properties.description: Maximum number of URLs to send per batch.

properties.name: front.google-indexation.enabled
properties.description: Enable Google Indexation dispatch in the front API.

properties.name: front.google-indexation.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum number of attempts before giving up on a URL.

properties.name: front.google-indexation.realtime-enabled
properties.description: Enable real-time Indexing API dispatch when a review generation succeeds.

properties.name: front.google-indexation.site-base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the public frontend used to build canonical product URLs.

properties.name: front.google-taxonomy.english-taxonomy-url
properties.description: URL of the English Google product taxonomy.

properties.name: front.google-taxonomy.french-taxonomy-url
properties.description: URL of the French Google product taxonomy.

properties.name: front.google-taxonomy.taxonomy-urls
properties.description: Additional Google product taxonomy URLs indexed by language code.

properties.name: front.mail-templates.templates[].body
properties.description: Localized body text for a reusable mail template.

properties.name: front.mail-templates.templates[].id
properties.description: Stable reusable mail template identifier.

properties.name: front.mail-templates.templates[].subject
properties.description: Localized subject text for a reusable mail template.

properties.name: front.mail-templates.templates[].to
properties.description: Recipient email override for a reusable mail template.

properties.name: front.max-page-size
properties.description: Maximum page size accepted by paginated endpoints.

properties.name: front.partners.ecosystem.partners[].bloc-id
properties.description: XWiki bloc identifier for an ecosystem partner.

properties.name: front.partners.ecosystem.partners[].image-url
properties.description: Relative image URL for an ecosystem partner.

properties.name: front.partners.ecosystem.partners[].name
properties.description: Display name of an ecosystem partner.

properties.name: front.partners.ecosystem.partners[].url
properties.description: Public website URL of an ecosystem partner.

properties.name: front.partners.mentors.partners[].bloc-id
properties.description: XWiki bloc identifier for a mentor partner.

properties.name: front.partners.mentors.partners[].image-url
properties.description: Relative image URL for a mentor partner.

properties.name: front.partners.mentors.partners[].name
properties.description: Display name of a mentor partner.

properties.name: front.partners.mentors.partners[].url
properties.description: Public website URL of a mentor partner.

properties.name: front.rate-limit.anonymous
properties.description: Maximum requests per minute for anonymous users.

properties.name: front.rate-limit.authenticated
properties.description: Maximum requests per minute for authenticated users.

properties.name: front.rate-limit.counter-ttl
properties.description: Duration after which idle rate-limit counters are purged.

properties.name: front.resource-root-path
properties.description: Absolute root URL used to expose downloadable static resources.

properties.name: front.review-generation.api-base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the back-office API exposing review generation endpoints.

properties.name: front.review-generation.api-key
properties.description: API key forwarded to authenticate against the back-office API.

properties.name: front.review-generation.connect-timeout
properties.description: Connection timeout for review generation HTTP calls.

properties.name: front.review-generation.quota.max-per-ip
properties.description: Maximum number of review generations allowed per IP during the quota window.

properties.name: front.review-generation.quota.window
properties.description: Duration of the quota window used to count review generations per IP.

properties.name: front.review-generation.read-timeout
properties.description: Read timeout for review generation HTTP calls.

properties.name: front.review-generation.review-path
properties.description: Path appended to the base URL when triggering or polling review generation.

properties.name: front.search.semantic-min-score
properties.description: Minimum semantic score required to keep a semantic search result.

properties.name: front.search.suggest.semantic-fallback-enabled
properties.description: Enable semantic fallback for product suggestions when prefix search yields no results.

properties.name: front.security.access-token-expiry
properties.description: Validity duration of generated access tokens.

properties.name: front.security.cors-allowed-hosts
properties.description: Origins allowed for CORS requests.

properties.name: front.security.enabled
properties.description: Enable Spring Security for the front API.

properties.name: front.security.jwt-secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign JWT tokens.

properties.name: front.security.refresh-token-expiry
properties.description: Validity duration of generated refresh tokens.

properties.name: front.security.shared-token
properties.description: Shared secret accepted in the X-Shared-Token header.

properties.name: front.semantic-diagnostics-enabled
properties.description: Enable semantic score diagnostics in global search responses.

properties.name: front.share.crawler-extraction-enabled
properties.description: Enable crawler-based extraction during share resolution.

properties.name: front.share.max-candidates
properties.description: Maximum number of candidates retained during share resolution.

properties.name: front.share.max-text-length
properties.description: Maximum text length accepted during share resolution.

properties.name: front.share.max-title-length
properties.description: Maximum title length accepted during share resolution.

properties.name: front.share.max-url-length
properties.description: Maximum URL length accepted during share resolution.

properties.name: front.share.resolution-window
properties.description: Maximum time window used to resolve a shared URL.

properties.name: front.share.store-ttl
properties.description: Time to keep share resolution entries in the in-memory store.

properties.name: geocode.cache.path
properties.description: Filesystem path used for cached geocode datasets.

properties.name: geocode.geonames.extracted-file-name
properties.description: Expected GeoNames data file name inside the downloaded archive.

properties.name: geocode.geonames.refresh-in-days
properties.description: Number of days before refreshing the cached GeoNames dataset.

properties.name: geocode.geonames.url
properties.description: Remote GeoNames dataset archive URL.

properties.name: geocode.maxmind.database-file-name
properties.description: Expected MaxMind database file name inside the downloaded archive.

properties.name: geocode.maxmind.refresh-in-days
properties.description: Number of days before refreshing the cached MaxMind dataset.

properties.name: geocode.maxmind.url
properties.description: Remote MaxMind GeoIP dataset archive URL.

properties.name: google-indexation.api-url
properties.description: Google Indexing API endpoint.

properties.name: google-indexation.batch-size
properties.description: Default number of URLs sent in one indexing batch.

properties.name: google-indexation.enabled
properties.description: Enable the Google Indexing API client.

properties.name: google-indexation.request-timeout
properties.description: Timeout applied to outbound Google Indexing API requests.

properties.name: google-indexation.service-account-json
properties.description: Raw service account JSON used to authenticate with the Google Indexing API.

properties.name: google-indexation.service-account-path
properties.description: Path to the service account JSON file used to authenticate with the Google Indexing API.

properties.description: XWiki REST media format.
